note: THIS JSON FILE WAS CREATED USING THE `DekModConfigMenu` MOD FOR PALWORLD! DO NOT MANUALLY EDIT THIS FILE UNLESS YOU KNOW WHAT YOU'RE DOING -- USE THE `DekModConfigMenu` MOD INSTEAD <3

meta.desc: PalMiniMap (based on Paldar by T3R3NC3B) - a minimap radar that displays live pal positions and more. Updated for Palworld 1.0 By Jean Kassio.

Minimap render resolution.desc: Lower numbers for better performance, at the cost of quality.

Minimap opacity.desc: Adjust transparency of the whole minimap.

Minimap shape.desc: Change minimap shape to circular or square.

Minimap image quality %.desc: Resolution of the minimap terrain image, as a percent of the render resolution. Lower = big GPU saving, blurrier map. Applied live.

Reduce captures when idle.desc: Skip re-rendering the minimap terrain while the view is not moving/turning/zooming. Big FPS saver when standing still or in base. No visual change.

Minimap autozoom while moving.desc: Auto zoom out minimap to different levels when walking, running & flying.

Minimap rotation lock.desc: Lock minimap rotation to north, player icon rotates instead.

Lock all icon rotations to north.desc: Locks all icons (excluding pals & NPCs) to be upright (north).

Autohide minimap while in base camps.desc: Hide minimap while in player base camps.

Show pal positions.desc: Show Pals around the player on the minimap.

Only show shiny pals.desc: Only shows shiny Pals around the player on the minimap.

Show pal icons while megazoomed out.desc: Keep Pal icons visible on the minimap while in megazoomed out mode.

NPCs and Points of Interest.desc: Customize display settings for NPCs and points of interest.

Show NPC humans.desc: Show NPC humans on the minimap.

Show player base camps.desc: Show player base camps on the minimap.

Show player death locations.desc: Show player death locations on the minimap.

Show other players.desc: Show other players around the player on the minimap.

Show dungeons.desc: Show dungeon locations on the minimap.

Chests, Notes, and Other.desc: Customize display settings for chests, notes, and other entities.

Show chests.desc: Show chests around the player on the minimap.

Show notes.desc: Show notes around the player on the minimap.

Show eggs.desc: Show eggs around the player on the minimap.

Show fast travel points.desc: Show fast travel points on the minimap.

Show skillfruit trees.desc: Show skillfruit trees around the player on the minimap.

Show lifmunk effigies.desc: Show Lifmunk Effigies around the player on the minimap.

Scan Frequencies.desc: Adjust scanning frequencies for various entities.

Pal rescan rate.desc: How often the radar will scan for new Pals around the player. In seconds.

Players rescan frequency.desc: How often the radar will scan for NEW players (not refresh rate of current players). In seconds.

Human NPC rescan frequency.desc: How often the radar will scan for NPC humans around the player on the minimap. In seconds.

Chest rescan frequency.desc: How often the radar will scan for chests around the player on the minimap. In seconds.

Egg rescan frequency.desc: How often the radar will scan for eggs around the player on the minimap. In seconds.

Megazoom mode toggle keybind.desc: Set keybind for megazoom out mode toggle. Hold this key and press + or - to fine-zoom the minimap.

Cycle default minimap positions keybind.desc: Set keybind for cycling between default minimap positions.

Customize minimap keybind.desc: Set keybind to enter customization mode - move with arrow keys, resize with + and - keys.

Use new minimap edit mode size method.desc: ON: resize minimap in edit mode with mouse scroll wheel (BROKEN on Palworld 1.0). OFF (default): resize with + and - keys (also 9 and 0).

Minimap capture FPS cap.desc: Max minimap terrain captures per second. Big FPS saver on high-refresh screens. 0 = uncapped (original behavior).

Minimap capture LOD bias.desc: Renders the minimap terrain with cheaper detail levels. 1 = original, higher = faster. Barely visible on the small map.
